Set_EmailSubject.inputs: @if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'registered security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'registered phone method'),'Phone Method Successfully Registered',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'registered Email Authentication Method'),'Email Method Successfully Registered',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'Authenticator App'),'Microsoft Authenticator App Successfully Registered',''))),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'deleted security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted phone method'),'Phone Method Successfully Deleted',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted Email Authentication Method'),'Email Method Successfully Deleted',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted Microsoft Authenticator'),'Microsoft Authenticator App Registration Successfully Deleted',''))),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'updated security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'changed Email Authentication Method'),'Email Method Successfully Changed',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'changed phone method'),'Phone Method Successfully Changed','')),'')))

Set_EmailOpeningMessage.inputs: @if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'registered security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'registered phone method'),'a phone number has been registered to',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'registered Email Authentication Method'),'an email has been registered to',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'Authenticator App'),'the Microsoft Authenticator app has been registered to',''))),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'deleted security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted phone method'),'a phone number has been deleted from',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted Email Authentication Method'),'an email has been deleted from',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted Microsoft Authenticator'),'the Microsoft Authenticator app registration has been deleted from',''))),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'updated security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'changed Email Authentication Method'),'an email has been changed on',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'changed phone method'),'a phone number has been changed on','')),'')))

Set_EmailActionVerb.inputs: @if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'registered security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'registered phone method'),'register a phone number',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'registered Email Authentication Method'),'register an email',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'Authenticator App'),'register your Microsoft account with the Microsoft Authenticator app',''))),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'deleted security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted phone method'),'delete a phone number',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted Email Authentication Method'),'delete an email',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'deleted Microsoft Authenticator'),'delete your Microsoft account registration with the Microsoft Authenticator app',''))),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['operationName'],'updated security info'),if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'changed Email Authentication Method'),'update an email',if(contains(body('Parse_JSON')?['activityResultReason'],'changed phone method'),'update a phone number','')),'')))

content.subject: @{outputs('Set_EmailSubject')}
content.html:
You are receiving this automated message because @{outputs('Set_EmailOpeningMessage')} your Microsoft account.

Activity: @{outputs('Set_Activity')}
Details: @{outputs('Set_Details')}
Time: @{outputs('Set_Time')}
Initated By: @{outputs('Set_InitiatedBy')}

If you made this change to your account on the Microsoft My Sign-In's site (https://mysignins.microsoft.com/security-info), you can ignore this email.

If you believe you did not recently @{outputs('Set_EmailActionVerb')}, contact our Information Security Office immediately at Ext. NNNN or #IncidentGroup@@example.com. Please include the email you received from DoNotReply@@example.com and let us know you were not aware of the change.

Do NOT reply to this email, this mailbox is not monitored.
